content.text: I'll read all five files for you.

1→import { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
     2→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'
     3→import { generateNotesPDF } from '@/lib/export'
     4→import type { Book, BookNote, Quote } from '@/types'
     5→
     6→export async function GET(
     7→  _req: NextRequest,
     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ bookId: string }> }
     9→) {
    10→  const { bookId } = await params
    11→
    12→  const [bookRes, notesRes, quotesRes] = await Promise.all([
    13→    supabase.from('books').select('*').eq('id', bookId).single(),
    14→    supabase.from('book_notes').select('*').eq('book_id', bookId),
    15→    supabase.from('quotes').select('*').eq('book_id', bookId).order('created_at'),
    16→  ])
    17→
    18→  if (bookRes.error || !bookRes.data) {
    19→    return Response.json({ error: 'Book not found' }, { status: 404 })
    20→  }
    21→
    22→  const pdfBuffer = await generateNotesPDF(
    23→    bookRes.data as Book,
    24→    (notesRes.data ?? []) as BookNote[],
    25→    (quotesRes.data ?? []) as Quote[]
    26→  )
    27→
    28→  const title = (bookRes.data as Book).title
    29→  const filename = encodeURIComponent(title) + '.pdf'
    30→
    31→  return new Response(pdfBuffer as unknown as BodyInit, {
    32→    headers: {
    33→      'Content-Type': 'application/pdf',
    34→      'Content-Disposition': `attachment; filename="${filename}"`,
    35→    },
    36→  })
    37→}
    38→

1→export type BookStatus = 'active' | 'completed' | 'paused'
     2→export type BookType = 'book' | 'article'
     3→export type NoteTab = 'outline' | 'scratch' | 'insights'
     4→
     5→export interface Book {
     6→  id: string
     7→  title: string
     8→  type: BookType
     9→  current_page: number
    10→  total_pages: number
    11→  sessions_per_week: number
    12→  sort_order: number | null
    13→  status: BookStatus
    14→  date_finished: string | null // YYYY-MM-DD
    15→  created_at: string
    16→  updated_at: string
    17→}
    18→
    19→export interface Session {
    20→  id: string
    21→  book_id: string
    22→  scheduled_date: string // ISO date string YYYY-MM-DD
    23→  pages_start: number
    24→  pages_end: number
    25→  actual_end_page: number | null
    26→  is_completed: boolean
    27→  order_index: number
    28→  created_at: string
    29→  updated_at: string
    30→  // joined
    31→  book?: Book
    32→}
    33→
    34→export interface PriorityItem {
    35→  id: string
    36→  title: string
    37→  description: string | null
    38→  sessions_needed: number
    39→  scheduled_date: string // ISO date string YYYY-MM-DD
    40→  is_completed: boolean
    41→  created_at: string
    42→}
    43→
    44→export interface BookNote {
    45→  id: string
    46→  book_id: string
    47→  tab: NoteTab
    48→  content: string
    49→  updated_at: string
    50→}
    51→
    52→export interface Quote {
    53→  id: string
    54→  book_id: string
    55→  quote_text: string
    56→  page_number: number | null
    57→  tags: string[]
    58→  heading_id: string | null
    59→  sort_order: number | null
    60→  created_at: string
    61→}
    62→
    63→export interface Connection {
    64→  id: string
    65→  source_type: 'quote' | 'note'
    66→  source_id: string
    67→  target_type: 'quote' | 'note'
    68→  target_id: string
    69→  note: string | null
    70→  created_at: string
    71→  // joined
    72→  target_book?: Book
    73→  target_quote?: Quote
    74→  target_note?: BookNote
    75→}
    76→
    77→// Schedule types
    78→export interface ScheduleEntry {
    79→  date: string // YYYY-MM-DD
    80→  type: 'session' | 'priority'
    81→  session?: Session
    82→  priority?: PriorityItem
    83→}
    84→
    85→// Search result types
    86→export type SearchResultType = 'quote' | 'note' | 'insight'
    87→
    88→export interface SearchResult {
    89→  type: SearchResultType
    90→  id: string
    91→  bookId: string
    92→  bookTitle: string
    93→  content: string
    94→  tags?: string[]
    95→  pageNumber?: number | null
    96→  tab?: NoteTab
    97→}
    98→

1→import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     2→import type { Book, Session, PriorityItem, BookNote, Quote, Connection, NoteTab, SearchResult } from '@/types'
     3→
     4→const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!
     5→const supabaseAnonKey = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!
     6→
     7→export const supabase = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseAnonKey)
     8→
     9→// Typed helpers
    10→
    11→export async function getBooks() {
    12→  const { data, error } = await supabase
    13→    .from('books')
    14→    .select('*')
    15→    .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    16→  if (error) throw error
    17→  return data as Book[]
    18→}
    19→
    20→export async function getBook(id: string) {
    21→  const { data, error } = await supabase
    22→    .from('books')
    23→    .select('*')
    24→    .eq('id', id)
    25→    .single()
    26→  if (error) throw error
    27→  return data as Book
    28→}
    29→
    30→export async function createBook(book: Omit<Book, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>) {
    31→  const { data, error } = await supabase
    32→    .from('books')
    33→    .insert(book)
    34→    .select()
    35→    .single()
    36→  if (error) throw error
    37→  return data as Book
    38→}
    39→
    40→export async function updateBook(id: string, updates: Partial<Book>) {
    41→  const { data, error } = await supabase
    42→    .from('books')
    43→    .update(updates)
    44→    .eq('id', id)
    45→    .select()
    46→    .single()
    47→  if (error) throw error
    48→  return data as Book
    49→}
    50→
    51→export async function deleteBook(id: string) {
    52→  const { error } = await supabase.from('books').delete().eq('id', id)
    53→  if (error) throw error
    54→}
    55→
    56→// Sessions
    57→
    58→export async function getSessionsForBook(bookId: string) {
    59→  const { data, error } = await supabase
    60→    .from('sessions')
    61→    .select('*')
    62→    .eq('book_id', bookId)
    63→    .order('order_index', { ascending: true })
    64→  if (error) throw error
    65→  return data as Session[]
    66→}
    67→
    68→export async function getUpcomingSessions(limit = 20) {
    69→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
    70→  const { data, error } = await supabase
    71→    .from('sessions')
    72→    .select('*, book:books(*)')
    73→    .gte('scheduled_date', today)
    74→    .eq('is_completed', false)
    75→    .order('scheduled_date', { ascending: true })
    76→    .limit(limit)
    77→  if (error) throw error
    78→  return data as (Session & { book: Book })[]
    79→}
    80→
    81→export async function updateSession(id: string, updates: Partial<Session>) {
    82→  const { data, error } = await supabase
    83→    .from('sessions')
    84→    .update(updates)
    85→    .eq('id', id)
    86→    .select()
    87→    .single()
    88→  if (error) throw error
    89→  return data as Session
    90→}
    91→
    92→export async function bulkInsertSessions(sessions: Omit<Session, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>[]) {
    93→  const { data, error } = await supabase
    94→    .from('sessions')
    95→    .insert(sessions)
    96→    .select()
    97→  if (error) throw error
    98→  return data as Session[]
    99→}
   100→
   101→export async function deleteSessionsForBook(bookId: string) {
   102→  const { error } = await supabase.from('sessions').delete().eq('book_id', bookId)
   103→  if (error) throw error
   104→}
   105→
   106→// Priority items
   107→
   108→export async function getPriorityItems() {
   109→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   110→    .from('priority_items')
   111→    .select('*')
   112→    .order('scheduled_date', { ascending: true })
   113→  if (error) throw error
   114→  return data as PriorityItem[]
   115→}
   116→
   117→export async function createPriorityItem(item: Omit<PriorityItem, 'id' | 'created_at'>) {
   118→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   119→    .from('priority_items')
   120→    .insert(item)
   121→    .select()
   122→    .single()
   123→  if (error) throw error
   124→  return data as PriorityItem
   125→}
   126→
   127→export async function updatePriorityItem(id: string, updates: Partial<PriorityItem>) {
   128→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   129→    .from('priority_items')
   130→    .update(updates)
   131→    .eq('id', id)
   132→    .select()
   133→    .single()
   134→  if (error) throw error
   135→  return data as PriorityItem
   136→}
   137→
   138→export async function deletePriorityItem(id: string) {
   139→  const { error } = await supabase.from('priority_items').delete().eq('id', id)
   140→  if (error) throw error
   141→}
   142→
   143→// Notes
   144→
   145→export async function getNotesForBook(bookId: string) {
   146→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   147→    .from('book_notes')
   148→    .select('*')
   149→    .eq('book_id', bookId)
   150→  if (error) throw error
   151→  return data as BookNote[]
   152→}
   153→
   154→export async function upsertNote(bookId: string, tab: NoteTab, content: string) {
   155→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   156→    .from('book_notes')
   157→    .upsert({ book_id: bookId, tab, content }, { onConflict: 'book_id,tab' })
   158→    .select()
   159→    .single()
   160→  if (error) throw error
   161→  return data as BookNote
   162→}
   163→
   164→// Quotes
   165→
   166→export async function getQuotesForBook(bookId: string) {
   167→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   168→    .from('quotes')
   169→    .select('*')
   170→    .eq('book_id', bookId)
   171→    .order('page_number', { ascending: true, nullsFirst: false })
   172→    .order('created_at', { ascending: true })
   173→  if (error) throw error
   174→  return (data as Quote[]).map(q => ({ ...q, tags: q.tags ?? [] }))
   175→}
   176→
   177→export async function createQuote(quote: Omit<Quote, 'id' | 'created_at'>) {
   178→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   179→    .from('quotes')
   180→    .insert({ ...quote, tags: quote.tags ?? [] })
   181→    .select()
   182→    .single()
   183→  if (error) throw error
   184→  return { ...(data as Quote), tags: (data as Quote).tags ?? [] }
   185→}
   186→
   187→export async function updateQuote(id: string, updates: Partial<Quote>) {
   188→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   189→    .from('quotes')
   190→    .update(updates)
   191→    .eq('id', id)
   192→    .select()
   193→    .single()
   194→  if (error) throw error
   195→  return { ...(data as Quote), tags: (data as Quote).tags ?? [] }
   196→}
   197→
   198→export async function deleteQuote(id: string) {
   199→  const { error } = await supabase.from('quotes').delete().eq('id', id)
   200→  if (error) throw error
   201→}
   202→
   203→// Connections
   204→// Requires table: connections(id, source_type, source_id, target_type, target_id, note, created_at)
   205→// SQL: CREATE TABLE connections (id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY, source_type text NOT NULL, source_id text NOT NULL, target_type text NOT NULL, target_id text NOT NULL, note text, created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now());
   206→
   207→export async function getConnectionsForSource(sourceId: string) {
   208→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   209→    .from('connections')
   210→    .select('*')
   211→    .eq('source_id', sourceId)
   212→    .order('created_at', { ascending: true })
   213→  if (error) throw error
   214→  return data as Connection[]
   215→}
   216→
   217→export async function createConnection(conn: Omit<Connection, 'id' | 'created_at'>) {
   218→  const { data, error } = await supabase
   219→    .from('connections')
   220→    .insert(conn)
   221→    .select()
   222→    .single()
   223→  if (error) throw error
   224→  return data as Connection
   225→}
   226→
   227→export async function deleteConnection(id: string) {
   228→  const { error } = await supabase.from('connections').delete().eq('id', id)
   229→  if (error) throw error
   230→}
   231→
   232→// Global search
   233→
   234→export async function searchAll(query: string): Promise<SearchResult[]> {
   235→  if (!query.trim() || query.trim().length < 2) return []
   236→
   237→  const q = query.trim()
   238→
   239→  const [quotesRes, notesRes] = await Promise.all([
   240→    supabase
   241→      .from('quotes')
   242→      .select('*, book:books(id, title)')
   243→      .ilike('quote_text', `%${q}%`)
   244→      .limit(30),
   245→    supabase
   246→      .from('book_notes')
   247→      .select('*, book:books(id, title)')
   248→      .ilike('content', `%${q}%`)
   249→      .limit(30),
   250→  ])
   251→
   252→  const results: SearchResult[] = []
   253→
   254→  for (const quote of quotesRes.data ?? []) {
   255→    const book = quote.book as Book
   256→    results.push({
   257→      type: 'quote',
   258→      id: quote.id,
   259→      bookId: book.id,
   260→      bookTitle: book.title,
   261→      content: quote.quote_text,
   262→      tags: quote.tags ?? [],
   263→      pageNumber: quote.page_number,
   264→    })
   265→  }
   266→
   267→  // Also search by tag (client-side filter for partial tag matches)
   268→  const tagQuotesRes = await supabase
   269→    .from('quotes')
   270→    .select('*, book:books(id, title)')
   271→    .contains('tags', [q])
   272→    .limit(20)
   273→
   274→  for (const quote of tagQuotesRes.data ?? []) {
   275→    if (results.find(r => r.id === quote.id)) continue
   276→    const book = quote.book as Book
   277→    results.push({
   278→      type: 'quote',
   279→      id: quote.id,
   280→      bookId: book.id,
   281→      bookTitle: book.title,
   282→      content: quote.quote_text,
   283→      tags: quote.tags ?? [],
   284→      pageNumber: quote.page_number,
   285→    })
   286→  }
   287→
   288→  for (const note of notesRes.data ?? []) {
   289→    const book = note.book as Book
   290→    results.push({
   291→      type: note.tab === 'insights' ? 'insight' : 'note',
   292→      id: note.id,
   293→      bookId: book.id,
   294→      bookTitle: book.title,
   295→      content: note.content,
   296→      tab: note.tab,
   297→    })
   298→  }
   299→
   300→  return results
   301→}
   302→

1→import { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
     2→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'
     3→import { buildAllSchedules } from '@/lib/scheduling'
     4→import type { Book } from '@/types'
     5→
     6→export async function GET(
     7→  _req: NextRequest,
     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
     9→) {
    10→  const { id } = await params
    11→  const { data, error } = await supabase.from('books').select('*').eq('id', id).single()
    12→  if (error) return Response.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 404 })
    13→  return Response.json(data)
    14→}
    15→
    16→export async function PATCH(
    17→  req: NextRequest,
    18→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
    19→) {
    20→  const { id } = await params
    21→  const body = await req.json()
    22→
    23→  const { data: updatedBook, error } = await supabase
    24→    .from('books')
    25→    .update(body)
    26→    .eq('id', id)
    27→    .select()
    28→    .single()
    29→  if (error) return Response.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
    30→
    31→  // Rebuild schedules whenever sort_order or status changes (affects who is Primary/Secondary)
    32→  if ('sort_order' in body || 'status' in body || 'total_pages' in body || 'current_page' in body) {
    33→    const { data: allBooksData } = await supabase
    34→      .from('books')
    35→      .select('*')
    36→      .eq('status', 'active')
    37→
    38→    const allBooks = (allBooksData as Book[]) ?? []
    39→
    40→    if (allBooks.length > 0) {
    41→      await supabase
    42→        .from('sessions')
    43→        .delete()
    44→        .in('book_id', allBooks.map(b => b.id))
    45→        .eq('is_completed', false)
    46→    }
    47→
    48→    const allRows = buildAllSchedules(allBooks)
    49→    if (allRows.length > 0) {
    50→      const CHUNK = 200
    51→      for (let i = 0; i < allRows.length; i += CHUNK) {
    52→        await supabase.from('sessions').insert(allRows.slice(i, i + CHUNK))
    53→      }
    54→    }
    55→  }
    56→
    57→  return Response.json(updatedBook)
    58→}
    59→
    60→export async function DELETE(
    61→  _req: NextRequest,
    62→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
    63→) {
    64→  const { id } = await params
    65→  const { error } = await supabase.from('books').delete().eq('id', id)
    66→  if (error) return Response.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
    67→  return new Response(null, { status: 204 })
    68→}
    69→
